description_long: This is a modern, flat-roofed house with a rectangular footprint and a minimalist design. The exterior is finished in light beige or taupe, complemented by large windows and several glass doors that open to patios and balconies. The house is surrounded by a low fence and landscaped with a mix of coniferous and deciduous trees, providing privacy and greenery. The rear features a spacious deck area, likely for outdoor seating or dining, and the front entryway is marked by a paved path and small garden beds. The structure appears to have two stories, with the upper level set back to create rooftop terraces. The overall aesthetic is clean and contemporary, with an emphasis on open, airy spaces and integration with the outdoor environment.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and landscaped surroundings. The design is minimalist, featuring light-colored walls, rooftop terraces, and a spacious rear deck.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, paved path, and landscaped garden with several trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the house, window placements, and the continuation of the tree line.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large deck area, fenced yard, and upper-level terraces.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional windows, trees, and the open backyard area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a paved path, small garden beds, and a simple, modern door without overhang or columns
